title: Column - Automatic Numeration

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Regarding the Automatic Numeration column, now there are only two kinds of escopes: “Group” and “Board”.

When I use this column on a subitem it keeps counting based on one of these escopes.

I’d like to keep the Automatic Numbers on my board, placed on subitem but with escope to the item itself, so everytime I create a new item, the subitems related to it starts again.

Example below: The order could start from 1 to 10, but due to the scope it starts with 2125 and goes to 2134.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: The marketplace app AutoID Subitems start with the defined starting number every time a parent gets it’s first subitem. Is that what you are looking for?

posts.author: davidmiller (David Millar)
posts.cookedHtml: The Automatic Numeration column currently only supports “Group” and “Board” scopes, which is causing your subitem numbering issue. Unfortunately, custom scopes for individual items are not available. Consider submitting a feature request to the support team for more flexible numeration options.

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I think I submitted it as a feature request

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey thank you, this app kind is what I was looking for, but it’s paid.
Thanks anyway.
